Visual Rules Builder

Marketing ships rules without filing tickets.

Drag a trigger, pick a condition, choose a reward. Watch your loyalty logic come to life — then flip to code mode and your engineers see the same rule as a typed config they can review in a PR.

Tier Architecture

Four tiers. Infinite configuration.

Define thresholds, reset cadences, earning multipliers, and benefit packages per tier. Roll tiers out progressively or flip the whole program at once with our safe-mode deploy.

  • ✓ Flexible thresholds: Points, spend, visit count, or any custom metric.
  • ✓ Tier benefits API: Query eligibility and unlock brand experiences on the fly.
  • ✓ Qualification windows: Annual reset, rolling 12-month, or lifetime — your call.
Read tier docs →

Challenges & Campaigns

Gamification that drives real behavior.

Time-boxed challenges with progress tracking drive urgency. A/B test challenge variants natively — no extra tooling, no sampling headaches.

  • ✓ Progress widgets: Embeddable via our JS SDK or React components.
  • ✓ Segment targeting: Ship challenges to Bronze-only or Platinum-at-risk cohorts.
  • ✓ Native A/B testing: Split traffic across earning rates and measure lift.
Explore challenges →

Rewards Catalog

Redemption that doesn't leak value.

Connect your Shopify or custom catalog, or use our built-in digital rewards (gift cards, discount codes, digital goods). Set minimum redemption thresholds, expiry policies, and per-tier visibility.

  • ✓ Catalog sync: Pull from your existing product library or curate manually.
  • ✓ Expiry policies: Keep your liability clean with configurable redemption windows.
  • ✓ Partial redemption: Let members redeem points + pay the rest — higher conversion.
See catalog options →

For developers

Visual and code stay in lockstep.

Every rule built in the visual editor is a typed config you can review in a PR. Every API-driven rule shows up in the visual editor for your marketing team to inspect. One source of truth. No drift.

Typed rule configs

JSON or YAML. Versioned in your repo. Diffable in PRs. Roll back any rule to any prior state in one click.

Dry-run before deploy

Test any rule against your last 30 days of customer events. See exactly which members would have triggered it.

Hooks at every step

Subscribe to tier.changed, points.earned, reward.redeemed and 30+ more events.

# Birthday reward rule — same as visual builder name: birthday_gold_platinum version: 3 enabled: true trigger: event: customer.birthday timezone: customer.local fires_at: "08:00" conditions: - customer.tier: in: [gold, platinum] actions: - type: issue_gift_card amount: 2500 # $25.00 currency: usd delivery: [email, wallet] - type: award_points amount: 500 reason: "Birthday bonus"
The 99minds difference

One customer. One ledger. Every balance.

Antavo and Yotpo are loyalty-only — so your gift card balance, store credit, and loyalty points live in three separate systems. We built them all. Your customer sees one unified wallet.

AL

Loyalty Engine
Points, tiers, challenges
Gift Cards
Digital & physical issuance
Store Credit
Refunds, returns, incentives
Wallet Passes
Apple & Google Wallet
!
With Antavo or Yotpo: your gift cards live in a separate vendor (often Giftfly or CashStar), store credit is a Shopify workaround, and wallet passes require another integration. That's 3–4 vendors, 3–4 contracts, and 3–4 sets of customer data.
Why teams switch from Antavo & Yotpo

Loyalty depth without the loyalty silo.

Antavo is a great loyalty platform — that doesn't do gift cards, store credit, or wallet passes. Yotpo bolted loyalty onto a reviews company. We built the whole reward stack from day one.

From kickoff to full member migration
Common questions

Things buyers usually ask.

Can we migrate members and points from Antavo or Yotpo?
+
Yes — we have proven migration playbooks for Antavo, Yotpo, Smile.io, and LoyaltyLion. We import member balances, tier assignments, and historical earning events so day-one balances match exactly. Most migrations finish in 4–6 weeks including parallel-running and final cutover.
How does pricing compare to Antavo for an enterprise program?
+
Antavo's enterprise pricing typically runs into six figures annually with significant implementation fees on top. 99minds pricing is tiered on monthly active members with no implementation fee for self-serve onboarding. For a program of 100k active members, our customers typically save 40–60% versus a comparable Antavo contract.
Does the rules builder handle truly complex earning logic?
+
Yes. Anything you can describe with a trigger event, conditional logic, and an action is buildable. Multi-step funnels, time-decayed earning, category-based multipliers, A/B-tested earning rates, partner-cobranded earning — all native. For the rare case that needs custom logic, drop into our scripting layer (sandboxed JavaScript).
Can we run multiple programs (B2B + B2C, or by region) on one account?
+
Yes — multi-program is native. Create as many distinct programs as you need with separate rule sets, tier structures, branding, and reporting. They share the underlying customer ledger so a member who's in two programs sees both balances cleanly.
What about international compliance and data residency?
+
EU, UK, and APAC data residency available. GDPR-ready data export and right-to-erasure tooling for member data. PSD2-compliant for European loyalty-as-payment use cases. SOC 2 Type II audited annually.

Ready to ship loyalty your marketing team owns?

Start with a sandbox key in 30 seconds. Talk to sales when you're ready to migrate.
